---
title: "Untitled"
author:
  - name: "Your Name"
    affiliation: "Your Affiliation"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Contents"
    number-sections: true
    embed-resources: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(toolero)
```

## Introduction

<!-- Replace this with your analysis. -->
